channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DEVIT] Dev IT Achieves Microsoft Elite Tier Partnership
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dev Information Technology Ltd (DEV IT) announced that it has achieved all six Microsoft Solutions Partner Designations (SPD) through its subsidiary, Dhyey Consulting Services Pvt. Ltd. This places DEV IT among a select group of companies in India with the complete suite of Microsoft specializations. The company reported a total income of ₹1,839.09 Mn, EBITDA of ₹237.18 Mn, and a net profit of ₹147.80 Mn in Consolidated FY25.

  • DEV IT achieves all six Microsoft Solutions Partner Designations.
  • This accomplishment enhances DEV IT's competitive positioning in the global IT services market.
  • DEV IT reported ₹147.80 Mn net profit in Consolidated FY25.
  • The company's Microsoft certification aligns with its North American parent company XDuce.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Information Technology Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [PATELENG] Patel Engineering Wins ₹1,593.08 Cr Nepal Hydropower Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Patel Engineering Ltd has been declared the Lowest Bidder (L1) by SJVN Lower Arun Power Development Company (P) Ltd for Package 2 of the 669 MW Lower Arun Hydropower Project in Nepal. The contract is valued at ₹1,593.08 Crores and involves critical civil and hydro-mechanical works. The project is scheduled to be completed within 54 months and is located in the Sankhuwasabha District of Nepal.

  • Patel Engineering secured a ₹1,593.08 Cr contract for a hydropower project in Nepal.
  • The project involves construction of tunnels, surge shafts, and a power house.
  • The project is expected to be completed within 54 months.
  • This win marks a positive start to Q1 FY27 for Patel Engineering.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PATEL ENGINEERING LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MADHAVIPL] Madhav Infra Projects Executes 9 PPAs for 73.15 MW
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Madhav Infra Projects Ltd. has executed nine Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) with Madhya Pradesh Power Management Company Limited for a total capacity of 73.15 MW. These concessions were awarded under the Feeder level Solarization, PM-KUSUM C Yojana. The project tenure is 25 years from the Scheduled Commissioning Date (SCD), and the company will sell energy to MPPMCL at a tariff ranging from ₹2.71 to ₹2.73 per unit.

  • Madhav Infra Projects executes 9 PPAs with MPPMCL.
  • Total capacity of the PPAs aggregates to 73.15 MW.
  • Project tenure is 25 years from the Scheduled Commissioning Date.
  • Tariff ranges from ₹2.71 to ₹2.73 per unit.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Madhav Infra Projects Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DALMIASUG] Dalmia Bharat Sugar files appeal against ₹42.54 Cr tax demand
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dalmia Bharat Sugar and Industries Ltd has filed an e-appeal with the National Faceless Appeal Centre against an assessment order for Assessment Year 2023-24. The appeal contests disallowances and additions made under the Income Tax Act, 1961, amounting to ₹42.54 Crore. The company expects to get relief in CIT (A) and will update stock exchanges on material developments.

  • Dalmia Bharat Sugar filed an e-appeal against assessment order for AY 2023-24.
  • The appeal contests disallowances and additions of ₹42.54 Crore.
  • The appeal was filed before the Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals).
  • DBSIL expects to get relief in CIT (A).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dalmia Bharat Sugar and Industries Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [RMC] RMC Switchgears Board Approves Postal Ballot on Director Regularization
item.description:
The Board of Directors of RMC Switchgears Ltd, in its meeting on April 23, 2026, approved the draft notice of postal ballot and calendar of events for seeking shareholder approval to regularize Mrs. Manisha Godara as an Independent Director. The board also approved the appointment of Mrs. Megha Khandelwal as the Scrutinizer for the postal ballot process. The trading window is closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board approves postal ballot for regularizing Mrs. Manisha Godara as Independent Director.
  • Mrs. Megha Khandelwal appointed as Scrutinizer for the postal ballot process.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post Q4 FY26 results.
  • Meeting commenced at 10:00 AM and concluded at 10:30 AM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RMC Switchgears Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JKCEMENT] JK Cement Declared Preferred Bidder for Karunda Limestone Block-1
item.description:
🔥 Trending

JK Cement Ltd has been declared the 'Preferred Bidder' in the e-auction conducted by the Government of Rajasthan for the Mining lease Karunda Limestone Block-I. The block spans 35.98 hectares and is located in Chittorgarh, Rajasthan. The information was received by the company on April 22, 2026, at approximately 2.09 PM (IST).

  • JK Cement wins bid for Karunda Limestone Block-I in Rajasthan.
  • The mining lease covers 35.98 hectares in Chittorgarh.
  • The e-auction was conducted by the Government of Rajasthan.
  • Information received by JK Cement on April 22, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: J.K.CEMENT LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GSBFIN] GSB Finance Ltd Announces Change in Company Website
item.description:
GSB Finance Ltd has announced a change in its company website address. The new website is now accessible at 'https://gsbfinancelimited.com/', replacing the previous address 'https://www.gsbgroup.co.in/'. This update is for informational purposes and company records.

  • GSB Finance Ltd has changed its official website address.
  • The new website address is https://gsbfinancelimited.com/.
  • The previous website address was https://www.gsbgroup.co.in/.
  • The change is for informational and record-keeping purposes.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GSB FINANCE LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge Completes Encora Acquisition; Cancels QIP
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Coforge Ltd. has successfully closed the acquisition of Encora. Shares were allotted to Encora sellers at ₹1815.91 per share. Coforge secured a $550 million three-year loan at 4.6% interest, leading to the cancellation of plans for a QIP. Encora's financials will be consolidated into Coforge starting May 1, 2026. The company anticipates a positive impact on FY’27 growth and margins due to integration synergies, with combined cost synergies on G&A expected to be between 20% to 25%. Vijay Verma will become a Senior Management Personnel (SMP).

  • Encora acquisition completed; shares allotted at ₹1815.91 per share.
  • QIP cancelled after securing $550 Mn loan at 4.6% interest.
  • Encora financials consolidate into Coforge effective May 1, 2026.
  • FY’27 growth and margins expected to benefit from Encora integration.
  • Vijay Verma appointed as Senior Management Personnel (SMP).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TANTIACONS] Twamev Construction: Independent Director Santanu Ray Demise
item.description:
Twamev Construction And Infrastructure Ltd. announced the demise of Independent Director, Mr. Santanu Ray, on April 18, 2026. Mr. Ray had been associated with the company for several years and made significant contributions through his guidance and understanding of governance. The company expressed condolences to his family.

  • Twamev Construction reports the death of Independent Director Santanu Ray.
  • Mr. Ray passed away on April 18, 2026.
  • The company acknowledges Mr. Ray's invaluable contributions to governance.
  • Twamev Construction expresses condolences to the bereaved family.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TANTIA CONSTRUCTIONS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MAHEPC] Mahindra EPC FY26 Revenue Up 14.5% to ₹315.79 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mahindra EPC Irrigation Ltd. announced its FY26 financial results, reporting a 14.5% increase in revenue to ₹315.79 crore. Profit before tax (PBT) rose by 58.5% to ₹16.99 crore, and profit after tax (PAT) increased by 76% to ₹12.69 crore. The company achieved its highest-ever annual revenue despite challenges like delayed fund releases and uneven rainfall. They are closely monitoring geopolitical developments and the upcoming monsoon season, recalibrating their market strategy accordingly.

  • FY26 revenue increased by 14.5% to ₹315.79 crore.
  • Profit before tax (PBT) increased by 58.5% to ₹16.99 crore.
  • Profit after tax (PAT) increased by 76% to ₹12.69 crore.
  • Company achieved highest-ever annual revenue despite industry headwinds.
  • GST reduction on micro-irrigation systems expected to drive industry growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mahindra EPC Irrigation Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
